documents.title: 278 Transaction
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report (Form 278-T) disclosing individual securities transactions over $1,000 during the reporting window. See PDF for the itemized transaction list.

documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: OGE-form certification by which Kristi Noem attested to having met the obligations in the Ethics Agreement. Marks Yes/No/N/A on standard sections (resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction reports filed, recusals, ethics briefing).

documents.title: Certificate of Divestiture OGE-2025-053
documents.summary: OGE-issued Certificate of Divestiture providing tax-deferral treatment for a specific qualifying divestiture. Document content is not publicly downloadable; available via Form 201 request from OGE.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Letter signed by Kristi Noem committing to specific divestitures, recusals and resignations to avoid conflicts of interest in the Secretary of Homeland Security role. See PDF for the full enumerated commitments.

documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Public financial disclosure filed before Senate confirmation. Lists assets, income sources, liabilities and outside positions held at time of nomination for the Secretary of Homeland Security role. See PDF for itemized holdings.
